raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 341 amends the California Rape Shield Law to apply the same rules of evidence for social media as other forms of evidence.",
    "Decades of social media activity irrelevant to the details of a sexual assault case are often mined and admitted into evidence, resulting in embarrassment or humiliation for victims.",
    "The bill requires that social media content be screened for relevancy before being admitted as evidence in sexual assault cases.",
    "The original protections of the California Rape Shield Law are no longer sufficient in light of expanding digital socialization.",
    "The amendments to the Rape Shield Law are intended to protect survivors of sexual assault and encourage them to testify against their perpetrators."
  ]
}
```
